title: glyceria distans var. minutula
intro: Glyceria distans var. minutula, also known as small mannagrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Glyceria distans var. minutula include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
